meta.title: The Luckiest Man: Life with John McCain
meta.description: Please join Hudson Institute for a conversation with Mark Salter about his new book, The Luckiest Man: Life with John McCain . The discussion will be moderated by Hudson Institute Vice President for Government Relations Dan McKivergan.
